title: CT13 static tactic graph — Tiered charging
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT13 (Tiered charging). It requires the complete 16-node array in fixed source order from CT13.N01 through CT13.N16, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT13 (Tiered charging) tactic specification; must equal "CT13".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N01, "Definition — demands D, tier-1 payers P_1, and availability hypothesis A", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N01, "Definition — demands D, tier-1 payers P_1, and availability hypothesis A"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N01, "Definition — demands D, tier-1 payers P_1, and availability hypothesis A"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N02, "Scope candidate — no measurable tier resource — scope audit", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N02, "Scope candidate — no measurable tier resource — scope audit"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N02, "Scope candidate — no measurable tier resource — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N03, "Dichotomy lemma — is A available?", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N03, "Dichotomy lemma — is A available?"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N03, "Dichotomy lemma — is A available?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N04, "Lemma — tier-1 canonical payment", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N04, "Lemma — tier-1 canonical payment"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N04, "Lemma — tier-1 canonical payment"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N05, "Payload lemma — build P_13→4 — tier-1 account", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N05, "Payload lemma — build P_13→4 — tier-1 account"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N05, "Payload lemma — build P_13→4 — tier-1 account"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N06, "CT 4 — charging", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N06, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N06, "CT 4 — charging"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N07, "Lemma — minimal obstruction O to availability", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N07, "Lemma — minimal obstruction O to availability"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N07, "Lemma — minimal obstruction O to availability"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N08, "Lemma — tier-2 charge to fallback payers P_2", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N08, "Lemma — tier-2 charge to fallback payers P_2"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N08, "Lemma — tier-2 charge to fallback payers P_2"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N09, "Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N09, "Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N09, "Lemma — tier resources disjoint or explicitly reconciled?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N10, "Routing theorem — what remains after reconciliation?", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N10, "Routing theorem — what remains after reconciliation?"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N10, "Routing theorem — what remains after reconciliation?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N11, "Theorem — combined tier capacity bound", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N11, "Theorem — combined tier capacity bound"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N11, "Theorem — combined tier capacity bound"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N12, "Payload record — overlap-obstruction residual", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N12, "Payload record — overlap-obstruction residual"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N12, "Payload record — overlap-obstruction residual"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N13, "Payload lemma — build P_13→9 or P_13→14", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N13, "Payload lemma — build P_13→9 or P_13→14"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N13, "Payload lemma — build P_13→9 or P_13→14"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N14, "C4 — capacity contradiction", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N14, "C4 — capacity contradiction"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N14, "C4 — capacity contradiction"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N15, "CT 9 — overload", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N15, "CT 9 — overload"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N15, "CT 9 — overload"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT13.N16, "CT 14 — aggregate closure", in CT13 (Tiered charging); must equal "CT13.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT13.N16, "CT 14 — aggregate closure"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT13.N16, "CT 14 — aggregate closure"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT13 (Tiered charging); must contain exactly 16 generic node objects in source order from CT13.N01 through CT13.N16, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
